Customers Who Never Order

https://leetcode.com/problems/customers-who-never-order/description/

Solved on 2026-06-22.

Given a table `Customers` with the following columns:

- `id`: the ID of the customer
- `name`: the name of the customer

And a table `Orders` with the following columns:

- `id`: the ID of the order
- `customerId`: the ID of the customer who ordered the order

Write a solution to find all customers who never order anything.

Return the result table in any order.

## Solution

```{sql}
SELECT
    c.name as Customers
FROM
    Customers as c
LEFT JOIN
    Orders as o ON o.customerId = c.id
WHERE
    o.customerId IS NULL
ORDER BY
    c.name;
```

## Explanation

From the `Customers` table, we left join with the `Orders` table on the `customerId` column. We then filter for rows where the `customerId` is NULL, which means the customer has never ordered anything. We then order the result by `name` (unnecessary, but nice to have) and return the `name` column as `Customers`.
